securityNotes: DOLT_PASSWORD is passed via MYSQL_PWD environment variable, not -p flag, to prevent process-list exposure
DoltHub push only occurs on explicit `dolt push` commands — memories are local by default
Ollama embeddings are sent to OLLAMA_URL; defaults to localhost:11434
Flux event publishing is disabled by default; only enabled when FLUX_URL is explicitly set
Flux events carry only metadata (id, category, amplitude, summary) — never full vectors or memory content
